news.t: J.P. Morgan to Transfer 14 ETFs From Current Exchanges

overview.description: The JPMorgan Municipal ETF (JMUB) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund is actively managed, investing in investment-grade US municipal securities with intermediate maturities. The fund seeks to provide capital preservation and monthly income that is federally tax-exempt. JMUB was launched on Oct 29, 2018 and is issued by JPMorgan Chase.

data.title: J.P. Morgan to Transfer 14 ETFs From Current Exchanges
data.text: NEW YORK, March 27, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- J.P. Morgan Asset Management today announced the upcoming exchange listing transfer of 14 ETFs from their current exchanges including the NASDAQ Stock Market L...
